text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Employment > Job Finding Assistance * Veterans 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions African American Community Homelessness Issues Seasonal Workers Substance Use Disorder Issues Veterans Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF THE DPI GROUP EMPLOYMENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides temporary and full-time employment opportunities for individuals facing employment barriers. 4950 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Age 18 and older People with disabilities, veterans, those experiencing homelessness, and those with justice system involvement Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-3pm Email (503) 281-1289 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE DPI GROUP EMPLOYMENT SERVICES
